mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.project_code as projectCode, p.project_name as ProjectName FROM elder_project_user pu LEFT JOIN elder_project p ON p.id = pu.project_id WHERE pu.del_flag = 0 AND p.del_flag = 0 AND p.`status` = '1' AND pu.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.project_code as projectCode, p.project_name as ProjectName FROM elder_project p WHERE p.del_flag = 0 AND p.`status` = '1'
